title: STATUS 2 Gang Blank White Switch Blanking Plate, Double Back-Box Cover for Redundant Sockets in Home or Office, Screw Fixing, White (SDBPB22)
availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CLEAN LOW PROFILE COVER Disguises disused double sockets or light switch cut-outs behind a smooth gloss face, stopping dust ingress and child curiosity while giving decorators a flawless surface that blends neatly with modern white wall plates and skirting boards.

EASY SCREW ALIGNMENT Elongated fixing slots allow lateral adjustment onto existing 2 gang 25 mm or 35 mm back boxes, compensating for off-centre conduit and cracked plaster so DIYers achieve flush, wobble-free results without chiselling or packers.

SMOOTH WIPE-CLEAN FINISH Fingerprint-resistant surface needs only a quick microfiber pass to stay pristine, making the blanking plate ideal for high-touch areas in offices, classrooms and healthcare corridors where hygiene and appearance both matter.

SAFETY FIRST INSTALL Isolate the 230V circuit at the consumer unit before removing old accessories, verify cables are dead with a tester and consult a qualified electrician if unsure, ensuring safe termination of conductors behind the new plate.
description: The STATUS 2 Gang Blanking Plate offers a quick, professional way to retire obsolete switches and twin sockets without messy plaster repairs. Moulded from durable fire-resistant ABS and finished in high-gloss white, the plate masks 86mm × 147mm back boxes, restoring a tidy look while protecting internal wiring from dust, finger probes and accidental contact. Slotted screw holes give a generous margin for alignment, perfect when original boxes sit slightly skewed after years of redecorating. Simply isolate the supply, cap or terminate live cores, position the plate and tighten the supplied screws until snug. A smooth wipe-clean face keeps maintenance minimal, and the neutral styling matches standard UK white accessories, blending into domestic hallways, commercial fit-outs and landlord refreshes alike.
